涉獵.gloss: to skim (through a book); to read cursorily; to dip into

接觸.gloss: to touch; to contact; access; in touch with

廣場舞.gloss: square dancing, an exercise routine performed to music in public squares, parks and plazas, popular esp. among middle-aged and retired women in China

稱呼.gloss: to call; to address as; form of address; appellation

維護.gloss: to defend; to safeguard; to protect; to uphold; to maintain

捍衛.gloss: to defend; to uphold; to safeguard

分得.explanation: 斷詞把「分」「得」連在一起了，分開看就是：分（part）、得（must）。

先入為主.gloss: (idiom) the first impression is the strongest; to hold a preconceived notion (about sth)

集體.gloss: collective (decision); joint (effort); a group; a team; en masse; as a group

諷刺.gloss: to satirize; to mock; irony; satire; sarcasm

美國人.gloss: American; American person; American people; CL:個|个[ge4]

先天.gloss: embryonic period (contrasted with 後天|后天[hou4 tian1]); inborn; innate; natural

達到.gloss: to reach; to achieve; to attain
